title: ibarn's quartet origins addon
description: This is an addon for the Origins mod which adds in four new origins
body:
This addon requires the [origins](https://modrinth.com/mod/origins) mod by Apace100 to properly function

Here is a quick rundown of the origins in this addon as of version 1.6.0:

 

Ghaster: descendants of Ghasts who were brought to the overworld

 

+ Can shoot blaze fireballs

+ Jumping while sneaking will cause you to inflate and rise for a short period of time

+ Don't take fire or fall damage

+ Float down slowly

= Semi-transparent body

- 8 hearts of health instead of 10

- Reduced melee damage and mining speed

---------------------------------------------------------

Sand Person: People who are adapted to thrive in sand

 

+ Gain resistance II when standing on sand

+ You are able to burrow yourself in the sand and become invisible while in the sand (permanent phasing ability for both sand and red sand)

= You spawn in a desert

= Sandy body

- You receive weakness when on anything other than sand

- You take 150% extra damage from shovels

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

Soul Mage: A sub-species of humans who learned to utilize their soul energy

 

+ Launch special soul fire balls that inflict soul burning (similar to wither but it bypasses armor and protection) and scale in power with your experience level
 
+ Gain a 50% melee damage boost while near soul fire or when holding soul-fire related items (or other piglin repellents) and a 100% melee damage boost plus a 50% damage boost for soul fire balls when standing directly on soul fire or soul campfires.

+ Gain soul speed 2 when on soul soil or soul sand (adds up with the soul speed enchantment)

+ Resistance to all magic damage sources (any source that Witches are resistant to) as well as immunity to soul burning

= Meat products replenish only half of the expected saturation and hunger but eating vegetables grants you experience points relative to how filling the food source was

= Piglins (excluding brutes) are scared of you

- Regular fire (torches, campfires, lanterns, and normal fire) reduces melee damage output by 90% and gives you mining fatigue

- Taking damage from any fire-related damage causes you to go blind for a short period of time

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Wither Wraith: Half-living half-undead creatures who became fused with Wither Cores from failed experiments
 


+ Launch homing wither skulls that seek the closest entity you were looking at when performing the attack

+ Melee and ranged attacks inflict wither

+ Flight

+ Don't take fall damage

+ Float down slowly

= Semi-transparent body

- Only 5 hearts of health

- Can't wear anything higher than iron armor

- Spawn in the nether
